implemented_slice: Production graph and path responses expose production_context with active data snapshot, active scoring profile, graph query version, scoring service version, record modes and publication policy.
Graph coverage reports relationship_fact_candidates excluded from graph edges until source threshold and human review publication gates pass.
GET /v1/scoring/explain/{objectType}/{objectId} supports relationship_fact_candidate explanations backed by existing Golden Vertical candidate/evidence/review tables.

GET /v1/scoring/explain/relationship/{objectId} supports published relationship explanations backed by relationship_evidence, fact_versions, data_snapshots, publication qualifiers and production_context.

GET /v1/scoring/explain/entity/{objectId} supports entity coverage explanations backed by entity identifiers, aliases, relationships, relationship evidence, industry memberships, optional entity fact_versions and production_context.
GET /v1/scoring/explain/event/{objectId} supports event coverage explanations backed by event_participants, event_evidence, source_documents, optional event fact_versions and production_context.

GET /v1/scoring/explain/industry/{objectId} supports industry coverage explanations backed by industry taxonomy hierarchy, entity_industry_memberships, relationship context/evidence, optional industry fact_versions and production_context.
Integration assertions bind A203 entity, event, industry, candidate and relationship scoring to FastAPI, repository queries, OpenAPI contract and curated fixture evidence.

Frontend commercial-map API-first hydration now posts the current focus, lens-derived layers, as-of date, scoring profile id and 42/64/12 budget to /v1/explore, exposes production_context, coverage and publication-gate metadata with explicit fixture fallback, and renders server-returned nodes/edges in the SVG canvas and graph table when the API response is available.
Production_context now exposes bounded sample relationship_fact_candidates so the frontend can discover a score explanation target without hard-coding database UUIDs.

Frontend production data hydration now loads /v1/catalogs and /v1/scoring/explain/relationship_fact_candidate/{objectId}, surfaces catalog inventory counts, source-of-truth counts, adjusted score, evidence count, missing-input count and publication status, and retains explicit local fallback/error states.

GET /v1/evidence/{objectType}/{objectId} exposes bounded evidence detail and source snippets for relationship_fact_candidate and published relationship objects using existing source_documents, sources, ingestion_evidence_chain, relationship_evidence and fixture_relationship_notices tables.
Evidence detail payload generation normalizes nullable PostgreSQL evidence fields into contract-safe structured_fact objects, counter_evidence arrays and string snippets.
Evidence detail production_context hydration calls the shared production_context_for_connection contract with as_of=None for current active context.

Frontend Evidence Center now hydrates /v1/evidence/relationship_fact_candidate/{objectId}, exposes evidence/source-document counts, endpoint state and source snippets, and refreshes the production evidence detail when the user clicks 打开证据.
explicitly_not_closed: Full production scoring engine for remaining non-relationship object families beyond entity, event and industry remains in T600-T608 and T1303.
Production-approved live relationship facts remain dependent on T1301/A202 live/full-text ingestion, second-source verification or production owner sign-off.
Candidate approval, publication into relationships and atomic global refresh remain dependent on the T1301/T1303 production gate.
4h and 24h soak tests remain in T1307/A209.

api_contracts.contract: ExploreResponse extends GraphResponse and includes production_context plus coverage.relationship_fact_candidates and bounded candidate_fact_summary.sample_candidates.
Catalog inventory response includes catalog_version, catalog_count, source_of_truth_count, total_declared_rows and catalog export links.
PathResponse includes production_context while preserving bounded evidence-bearing recursive path results.

entity, event, industry, relationship_fact_candidate and published relationship score explanations include raw_score, evidence_quality, adjusted_score, coverage, missing_inputs, evidence, model/profile versions and production_context.

relationship_fact_candidate and relationship evidence details include evidence_count, returned_evidence_count, source_document_count, truncation state, source snippets, source document summaries and production_context.

entity.formula_points: identifier 20 + alias 10 + relationship context 20 + relationship family diversity 15 + source threshold 15 + industry membership 10 + fact version 10, multiplied by active status.

event.formula_points: participant context 20 + source threshold 20 + timing context 15 + amount semantics 10 + active event status 10 + evidence chain 15 + fact version 10, multiplied by active event status.

industry.formula_points: entity context 20 + relationship context 20 + relationship family diversity 15 + source threshold 15 + taxonomy hierarchy 10 + active industry status 10 + fact version 10, multiplied by active industry status.
